_meta.description: Data shapes for the Verified screen. The org's standing in the Canopy verification system. Four credit pipelines, each backed by a complete on-chain evidence chain. The export generates a structured proof document — the org's work on the platform is the report.

EnvironmentalCredit._description: The tradeable environmental asset. Backed by GPS-verified site, photo evidence, DID-linked verifier consensus, and 30-90 day transformation confirmation. Aligned with UNEP Global Plastics Treaty framework.
EnvironmentalCredit.creditType: enum: plastic_recovery | dumpsite_transformation | urban_greening | waterway_clearance | fair_collector

quantity.displayLabel: string — e.g. 2.4 tonnes of soft plastic diverted from Nairobi waterways

TransformationRecord_Summary._description: Lightweight summary read for the Verified screen pipeline cards. Full document is in transformation_records/{transformationId}.

VerificationTierBadgeVM._description: The prominent gradient badge at the top of the Verified screen.
VerificationTierBadgeVM.tierDisplayName: string — Registered | Verified | Impact Partner | Credit Issuer
VerificationTierBadgeVM.completedConditions: array<string> — e.g. ['✓ 3 buy orders', '✓ Zone mapped', '✓ 30-day site', '✓ 6 months active']

nextTier.remainingConditions: array<string> — what the org still needs

PlasticRecoveryCreditPanelVM._description: Expandable panel for the Plastic Recovery Credit pipeline.

inProgress.kgLogged: number — verified kg not yet at credit threshold
inProgress.progressLabel: string — e.g. 280 kg of 500 kg threshold

evidenceChainPreview._description: The tap-to-expand chain for the most recent issued credit.
evidenceChainPreview.collectorStep: string — e.g. James Odhiambo · Collector ID #C-0019
evidenceChainPreview.collectionStep: string — e.g. GPS: Kibera Zone A · 14 Jan 2026
evidenceChainPreview.handoffStep: string — e.g. Kibera Hub · 84 kg weighed and confirmed

DumpsiteTransformationPanelVM._description: Expandable panel for the Dumpsite Transformation Credit pipeline.

TransformationSiteVM._description: One site card within the Dumpsite Transformation panel.
TransformationSiteVM.siteLabel: string — e.g. Laini Saba Dumpsite, Mathare River Bank C

stageStatus.stage3: enum: pending | overdue | confirmed | failed | null

TransformationSiteVM.followUpDueLabel: string | null — e.g. 30-day check due in 8 days | 60-day check due in 3 weeks
TransformationSiteVM.followUpColor: Color — green if >14 days, amber if 1–14, red if overdue
TransformationSiteVM.outcome: enum: in_progress | holding | credit_eligible | credited | failed
TransformationSiteVM.outcomeLabel: string — In progress | Holding ✓ | Credit eligible | Credited | Site not held
TransformationSiteVM.failureReason: string | null — shown honestly when outcome=failed

UrbanGreeningPanelVM._description: Expandable panel for Urban Greening Credits. Reads from Trees tab data.
UrbanGreeningPanelVM.ctaLabel: string — e.g. Confirm 7 more trees at 90 days | Apply for first credit

WaterwayClearancePanelVM._description: Expandable panel for Waterway Clearance Credits.

WaterwaySectionVM.sectionLabel: string — e.g. Section A — Nairobi River km 4.2–4.6
WaterwaySectionVM.followUpStatus: enum: pending | due_soon | overdue | holding | failed
WaterwaySectionVM.followUpLabel: string — e.g. 30-day follow-up due in 8 days | Holding ✓ | Not held

IssuedCreditVM._description: Compact card for an individual issued credit — reused across all credit type panels.

VerifiedStatStripVM._description: Optional summary strip if used above the tier badge.

ExportButtonVM._description: The Export Verification Summary card at the bottom of the screen.
ExportButtonVM.label: string — Export Verification Summary
ExportButtonVM.sublabel: string — PDF & JSON  ·  Ready for sponsors, grants, credit buyers
ExportButtonVM.lastExportedLabel: string | null — e.g. Last exported 2 Jan 2026
ExportButtonVM.exportReady: boolean — true when org has at least one issued credit or verified transformation

EnvVerifiedScreenState._description: Local state for the Verified screen.

expandedPanels._description: Track which credit panels are expanded.

EnvVerifiedScreenState.evidenceChainExpanded: string | null — creditId of the credit whose chain is expanded

VerificationTierConfig._description: Platform constants defining tier unlock conditions. Evaluated server-side, displayed client-side.

conditions: 3 completed buy orders with weight confirmation
Territory map with at least 1 active zone
6 months of consistent activity (no gap > 30 days)
Minimum 500 kg verified plastic OR 50 trees at 90 days OR 100m waterway cleared
